scene: A doodle stick figure standing in front of a tall mirror looking puzzled, a big question mark above, the reflection facing back at it. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure facing a mirror with a bold double-headed arrow pointing straight INTO and OUT of the mirror surface (front to back), not sideways. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure raising one hand colored bright red, and its mirror reflection raising the hand on the matching same side also colored bright red, a little aha spark. Flat deep blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure pointing at itself with a big aha grin, a little cartoon brain above it spinning around to face the other way. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
